basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 787 Anganwadi Worker & Helper Posts in Bijnour, Kanpur District
basic_details.organization_name: District Programme Office – Bijnour & Kanpur Nagar (Under UP Bal Vikas Vibhag)
basic_details.short_information: This recruitment is issued under Government Order No. S-2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17 September 2025. Both Bijnour and Kanpur Nagar districts have released separate notifications on 24 June 2026 as part of the same statewide UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026 drive. Recruitment is merit-based with no written examination - selection is based on academic marks and priority order as per government rules.

qualification.details: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for UP Anganwadi Karyakartri Bharti 2026. The minimum educational qualification differs between the Worker and Helper posts. Candidates must be a permanent resident of the same Gram Sabha / Ward in which the vacancy exists - applications from candidates of other Gram Sabhas or Wards will not be accepted. | For the Anganwadi Karyakartri post, merit is prepared on the basis of marks obtained in Intermediate or equivalent qualification. For higher qualifications (graduation/post-graduation), marks are also factored into merit. The merit list is prepared using a grading and CGPA system - decimal points after three places are not rounded up. If two candidates secure equal marks, the one with higher age is given priority. If both marks and age are equal, the candidate with higher educational qualification is ranked higher. | The age limit for both posts is minimum 18 years and maximum 35 years. Age is calculated as on 01 January 2026. High school marks certificate and date of birth proof must be as entered in the online application form. Age relaxation as per UP government rules applies to reserved category candidates. | This is a strict eligibility condition unique to Anganwadi recruitment. The applicant must be a permanent resident of the same Gram Sabha / Ward (for urban areas) for which the vacancy is posted. Applications from women residing in other Gram Sabhas or Wards will be summarily rejected. For Kanpur Nagar, the notification specifically states this residency requirement is mandatory.

selection_process: There is no written examination for UP Anganwadi Sahayika and Karyakartri recruitment. Selection is entirely merit-based
using academic marks. However
within the same merit
a government-mandated priority order is applied. Understanding this priority order is essential because it determines who gets selected even among candidates with equal marks.
Priority 1 (BPL): Widow / legally divorced / deserted woman from the same Gram Sabha / Ward who lives below the poverty line (BPL). If no such woman applies

then BPL woman from the same Gram Sabha who sustains the family. Priority 2 (APL): Widow / legally divorced / deserted woman from the same Gram Sabha / Ward who lives above the poverty line (APL). If no such woman applies
then APL woman from the same Gram Sabha who sustains the family. Priority 3: If no candidate from the above two categories is available from the same Gram Sabha
an ordinary woman from the Gram Sabha is selected on the basis of overall merit.
For widows
proof must include a death certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer / urban local body and a certified copy of the family register. For divorcees / deserted women
a legal court order is required. Income proof for BPL/APL status must be issued by the Revenue Department of Uttar Pradesh - an annual income of up to Rs. 46
080 qualifies for rural BPL and up to Rs. 56
460 for urban BPL centres.
One important rule: two women from the same family cannot be appointed as Anganwadi Karyakartri at the same Anganwadi centre.UP Anganwadi Apply Online 2026 – Step-by-Step Process
The UP Anganwadi Apply Online 2026 process is available exclusively through the official departmental website at http://upanganwadibharti.in. No offline applications
paper submissions
or postal applications will be accepted under any circumstances. The online form must be filled carefully - errors in data or uploaded documents can result in outright rejection of the application.

Visit the official UP Anganwadi recruitment website: http://upanganwadibharti.in Select your district - Bijnour or Kanpur Nagar - and the relevant post (Karyakartri or Sahayika). Select the specific Bal Vikas Pariyojana project and Gram Sabha / Ward where you are a permanent resident. Fill in your personal details
date of birth (as per High School certificate)
and residential details accurately. Enter your academic qualifications - Intermediate marks
graduation marks if applicable. Upload self-attested copies of all required documents in the formats accepted by the portal. If applicable
upload BPL/APL income proof
widow death certificate

or divorce/desertion court order. Review all details carefully in the preview screen before final submission. Submit the application and save the application number / confirmation receipt for future reference.
Important: Only the online application form as per the format on the departmental website will be accepted. The applicant must upload self-attested
legible
and readable copies of all documents mentioned in the application form. No correction of errors after submission via offline mode will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The official UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 notification PDFs for Bijnour and Kanpur Nagar districts have been released by the respective District Programme Officers and are available on the departmental website. The notifications contain complete details of project-wise and ward-wise vacancies, reservation details, and the full application procedure. Candidates can download the UP Anganwadi Karyakartri Sahayika Bharti 2026 notification PDF and the project-wise vacancy list from the links below.

rows.document: Official UP Anganwadi Bharti Website (Notification + Apply Online)

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026 – Quick Overview
content_sections.text: This recruitment is issued under Government Order No. S-2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17 September 2025. Both Bijnour and Kanpur Nagar districts have released separate notifications on 24 June 2026 as part of the same statewide UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026 drive. Recruitment is merit-based with no written examination - selection is based on academic marks and priority order as per government rules.

rows.information: District Programme Office – Bijnour & Kanpur Nagar (Under UP Bal Vikas Vibhag)

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 – Important Dates
content_sections.text: Both the Bijnour and Kanpur Nagar UP Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 notifications were issued on the same date - 24 June 2026 - under the same state government order. Candidates must note that the online application portal closes strictly by the deadline, and no offline application in any form (paper, postal, or otherwise) will be accepted or considered under any circumstances. The last date to apply online for UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 in Bijnour is 15 July 2026 at 12:00 midnight , and for Kanpur Nagar the last date is 15 July 2026 . Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid server congestion on the last day.

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 – District-Wise and Project-Wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The UP Anganwadi Worker Vacancy 2026 is distributed across urban and rural Bal Vikas Pariyojana projects within each district. Bijnour has vacancies for both Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts, while the Kanpur Nagar notification covers only Anganwadi Karyakartri vacancies. The tables below give the complete project-wise vacancy details for both districts.

tables.caption: Kanpur Nagar District – Anganwadi Karyakartri (Worker) Vacancies: 259

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Eligibility Criteria 2026 – Who Can Apply
content_sections.text: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for UP Anganwadi Karyakartri Bharti 2026. The minimum educational qualification differs between the Worker and Helper posts. Candidates must be a permanent resident of the same Gram Sabha / Ward in which the vacancy exists - applications from candidates of other Gram Sabhas or Wards will not be accepted. For the Anganwadi Karyakartri post, merit is prepared on the basis of marks obtained in Intermediate or equivalent qualification. For higher qualifications (graduation/post-graduation), marks are also factored into merit. The merit list is prepared using a grading and CGPA system - decimal points after three places are not rounded up. If two candidates secure equal marks, the one with higher age is given priority. If both marks and age are equal, the candidate with higher educational qualification is ranked higher. The age limit for both posts is minimum 18 years and maximum 35 years . Age is calculated as on 01 January 2026 . High school marks certificate and date of birth proof must be as entered in the online application form. Age relaxation as per UP government rules applies to reserved category candidates. This is a strict eligibility condition unique to Anganwadi recruitment. The applicant must be a permanent resident of the same Gram Sabha / Ward (for urban areas) for which the vacancy is posted . Applications from women residing in other Gram Sabhas or Wards will be summarily rejected. For Kanpur Nagar, the notification specifically states this residency requirement is mandatory.

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Selection Process 2026 – Merit and Priority Order
content_sections.text: There is no written examination for UP Anganwadi Sahayika and Karyakartri recruitment. Selection is entirely merit-based, using academic marks. However, within the same merit, a government-mandated priority order is applied. Understanding this priority order is essential because it determines who gets selected even among candidates with equal marks. Priority 1 (BPL): Widow / legally divorced / deserted woman from the same Gram Sabha / Ward who lives below the poverty line (BPL). If no such woman applies, then BPL woman from the same Gram Sabha who sustains the family. Priority 2 (APL): Widow / legally divorced / deserted woman from the same Gram Sabha / Ward who lives above the poverty line (APL). If no such woman applies, then APL woman from the same Gram Sabha who sustains the family. Priority 3: If no candidate from the above two categories is available from the same Gram Sabha, an ordinary woman from the Gram Sabha is selected on the basis of overall merit. For widows , proof must include a death certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer / urban local body and a certified copy of the family register. For divorcees / deserted women , a legal court order is required. Income proof for BPL/APL status must be issued by the Revenue Department of Uttar Pradesh - an annual income of up to Rs. 46,080 qualifies for rural BPL and up to Rs. 56,460 for urban BPL centres. One important rule: two women from the same family cannot be appointed as Anganwadi Karyakartri at the same Anganwadi centre .UP Anganwadi Apply Online 2026 – Step-by-Step Process The UP Anganwadi Apply Online 2026 process is available exclusively through the official departmental website at http://upanganwadibharti.in . No offline applications, paper submissions, or postal applications will be accepted under any circumstances. The online form must be filled carefully - errors in data or uploaded documents can result in outright rejection of the application. Visit the official UP Anganwadi recruitment website: http://upanganwadibharti.in Select your district - Bijnour or Kanpur Nagar - and the relevant post (Karyakartri or Sahayika). Select the specific Bal Vikas Pariyojana project and Gram Sabha / Ward where you are a permanent resident. Fill in your personal details, date of birth (as per High School certificate), and residential details accurately. Enter your academic qualifications - Intermediate marks, graduation marks if applicable. Upload self-attested copies of all required documents in the formats accepted by the portal. If applicable, upload BPL/APL income proof, widow death certificate, or divorce/desertion court order. Review all details carefully in the preview screen before final submission. Submit the application and save the application number / confirmation receipt for future reference. Important: Only the online application form as per the format on the departmental website will be accepted. The applicant must upload self-attested, legible, and readable copies of

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Application
content_sections.text: Candidates must keep the following documents ready before starting the online application. All documents must be self-attested and uploaded in the format accepted by the upanganwadibharti.in portal. Documents issued by individuals (not government authorities) will not be accepted. Note on certificates: Residence and caste certificates must be digitally signed and issued by the Tehsil through the online verification system - manual/hand-signed versions are not accepted unless online verification is possible. For widows, the death certificate and family register copy from the Gram Panchayat or Nagar Palika/Nagar Nigam are mandatory.

rows.document: Residence / Domicile Certificate (Digital, issued by Tehsil via online system)
rows.purpose: Permanent residency proof for the respective Gram Sabha/Ward

rows.document: Caste Certificate (Digital, issued by Tehsil via online system)

rows.purpose: For priority category applicants - must be issued by UP Revenue Department
Issued by Gram Panchayat Officer or urban local body - mandatory for Priority 1 category
Certified copy from Gram Panchayat or Nagar Palika
Legal court order from competent authority

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid – UP Anganwadi Sahayika Karyakartri Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: Based on the requirements stated in the official notifications for Bijnour and Kanpur Nagar, the following are the most critical errors that commonly lead to application rejection in UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026. Applying from a different Gram Sabha or Ward: This is the single biggest disqualifier. The applicant must be a permanent resident of the exact Gram Sabha or Ward where the vacancy exists. Women from neighbouring villages or wards cannot apply for a post in another area. Uploading non-digital or manually signed certificates: Residence and caste certificates must be digitally signed by the Tehsil authority and verifiable online. Manually signed photocopies will not be accepted. Using income certificates issued by individuals: Income certificates issued by any individual (not the Revenue Department) will not be accepted for BPL/APL classification. Submitting an offline or postal application: No offline application in any form - paper, postal, or in-person - is accepted. Only the online form at upanganwadibharti.in is valid. Not mentioning the correct project/Pariyojana name: The vacancy you apply for must match the exact Bal Vikas Pariyojana project and Gram Sabha. Selecting the wrong project leads to automatic disqualification. Two women from the same family applying for the same centre: Two women from the same family cannot be appointed at the same Anganwadi centre - if found, the application will be cancelled. Incorrect date of birth: The date of birth must match the High School certificate exactly. Any mismatch results in rejection. Age is verified as on 01 January 2026. Missing widow/divorce proof for priority claim: Applicants claiming Priority 1 or 2 status (widow/divorced/deserted) must upload the required legal documents. Without them, the priority claim is disregarded and the application is treated as a general merit case.

faq.question: Q1. What is UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 and which districts are covered?
faq.answer: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 refers to the notifications released by the District Programme Officers of Bijnour and Kanpur Nagar under the state government order S-2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687). A combined total of 787 vacancies are available - 268 Karyakartri and 260 Sahayika in Bijnour, and 259 Karyakartri in Kanpur Nagar.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 15 July 2026 at 12:00 midnight for Bijnour and 15 July 2026 for Kanpur Nagar. Applications must be submitted only through the official website http://upanganwadibharti.in — no offline applications are accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for UP Anganwadi Karyakartri Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Only women candidates are eligible. For Anganwadi Karyakartri (Worker), the minimum qualification is Intermediate (10+2). For Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper), Class 5 pass is the minimum. The candidate must be a permanent resident of the specific Gram Sabha or Ward where the vacancy exists.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for UP Anganwadi Sahayika Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 35 years, calculated as on 01 January 2026. Age is verified from the High School certificate. Reserved category candidates receive age relaxation as per UP government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there a written examination for UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. There is no written examination. Selection is entirely merit-based, using marks obtained in the educational qualifications. Within equal merit, a government-mandated priority order (BPL widow → APL widow → general woman) is applied.

faq.question: Q6. What is the priority order for UP Anganwadi Karyakartri selection?
faq.answer: Priority is given first to BPL widows/legally divorced/deserted women of the same Gram Sabha, then to APL widows/divorced/deserted women, and finally to any other ordinary woman of the Gram Sabha based on overall merit. This priority is applicable within each Gram Sabha independently.

faq.question: Q7. Can women from other villages or wards apply for UP Anganwadi Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: No. The applicant must be a permanent resident of the exact Gram Sabha or Ward where the vacancy exists. Applications from candidates belonging to other Gram Sabhas or Wards will not be considered — this is a strict eligibility condition.

faq.question: Q8. What income certificate is valid for BPL status in UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: For rural areas, the annual income must be up to Rs. 46,080 and for urban areas up to Rs. 56,460 to qualify as BPL. The income certificate must be issued by the Revenue Department of Uttar Pradesh. Income certificates issued by individuals are not accepted.

faq.question: Q9. What documents does a widow need to submit for priority status in UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A widow must submit a death certificate of the husband issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer or the relevant urban local body (Nagar Palika/Nagar Nigam), along with a certified copy of the family register. Court orders are required for divorcees or deserted women.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I apply online for UP Anganwadi Karyakartri Sahayika Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only at http://upanganwadibharti.in. This is the only official platform for UP Anganwadi recruitment. No other website, paper form, or postal submission is valid.
